tool.name: iep
tool.summary: Estimate deterministic protein isoelectric points from a fixed explicit pKa model

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `iep` estimates one protein isoelectric point per input record. The Epithema v1 implementation uses a fixed explicit pKa model for the N terminus, C terminus, and the D/E/C/Y/H/K/R side chains, and reports the same model's net charge at pH 7.0.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current interface accepts one local protein input path. Inputs are loaded through the shared Epithema readers for FASTA, FASTQ, EMBL, and GenBank. Explicit nucleotide inputs are rejected. Gap symbols are ignored; stop symbols are ignored before estimation; unsupported ambiguous protein residues are rejected.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The tool emits a stable table report with columns `record`, `residue_length`, `titratable_side_chains`, `aspartate`, `glutamate`, `cysteine`, `tyrosine`, `histidine`, `lysine`, `arginine`, `net_charge_ph7`, and `estimated_pi`.

sections.title: Model
sections.content: This first release is intentionally narrow and deterministic. It solves for the pI by bisection over a fixed pH range using the shared explicit pKa set and Henderson-Hasselbalch style charge fractions. It does not expose alternative pKa models, pH titration curves, or solvent-condition tuning.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `epithema iep`. Validation currently covers basic versus mixed protein fixtures, stable per-record reporting, and nucleotide-input rejection.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The first release is a governed deterministic estimate, not a broad biochemical modeling surface. Ambiguous residues such as `X` or `Z` cause the run to fail instead of being approximated.

artifacts.label: Protein pI fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed protein fixture used to validate deterministic per-record pI estimation.

examples.title: Estimate pI for protein records
examples.description: Loads a small protein fixture and reports one deterministic pI estimate per record.

expected_outputs.label: Protein pI table
expected_outputs.description: A stable tabular report containing per-record titratable counts, net charge at pH 7.0, and estimated pI.
